# HUMMBL Bibliography — llms.txt

> AI-readable index of the HUMMBL bibliography.
> 240 curated entries across 12 tiers, covering AI governance, cognitive science,
> systems thinking, multi-agent coordination, and adversarial ML.
> Generated: 2026-04-09 | Version: 1.1.0

## Query API

The bibliography is queryable via node toolkit/src/query.js:
  --tier T4          Filter by tier
  --keyword HUMMBL:BKI  Filter by HUMMBL transformation keyword
  --nist-function GOVERN  Filter by NIST AI RMF function
  --eu-ai-act 12     Filter by EU AI Act article
  --search "term"    Full-text search over title + abstract
  --format json|jsonl|markdown|table

## HUMMBL Transformation Keywords

  HUMMBL:SY  — Systemic/structural transformation
  HUMMBL:CO  — Coordination and collaboration
  HUMMBL:P   — Process and workflow
  HUMMBL:RE  — Reasoning and decision-making
  HUMMBL:IN  — Infrastructure and implementation
  HUMMBL:DE  — Design and architecture
  HUMMBL:BKI — Belonging as Knowledge Infrastructure

## T1: Canonical Foundations — seminal works in cognitive science, systems thinking, philosophy of science

- **Meadows2008ThinkingSystems** (Meadows, 2008)
  Thinking in Systems: A Primer
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:CO

- **Kahneman2011Thinking** (Kahneman, 2011) doi:10.1037/e412042005-001
  Thinking, Fast and Slow
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:DE

- **Simon1996Sciences** (Simon, 1996) doi:10.7551/mitpress/1881.001.0001
  The Sciences of the Artificial
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:DE

- **Newell1972Human** (Newell, 1972)
  Human Problem Solving
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:DE

- **Csikszentmihalyi1990Flow** (Csikszentmihalyi, 1990)
  Flow: The Psychology of Optimal Experience
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **Norman2013DesignEveryday** (Norman, 2013) doi:10.15358/9783800648108
  The Design of Everyday Things
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:CO

- **Pearl2009Causality** (Pearl, 2009) doi:10.1017/CBO9780511803161
  Causality: Models, Reasoning, and Inference
  Keywords: HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:RE

- **Lakoff1980MetaphorsWeLive** (Lakoff, 1980)
  Metaphors We Live By
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:SY

- **Hofstadter1979Godel** (Hofstadter, 1979)
  Gödel, Escher, Bach: An Eternal Golden Braid
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:SY

- **Kuhn1996Structure** (Kuhn, 1996) doi:10.7208/chicago/9780226458106.001.0001
  The Structure of Scientific Revolutions
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN

- **Tufte2001VisualDisplay** (Tufte, 2001)
  The Visual Display of Quantitative Information
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:SY

- **Taleb2007BlackSwan** (Taleb, 2007)
  The Black Swan: The Impact of the Highly Improbable
  Keywords: HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:P

- **Alexander1977Pattern** (Alexander, 1977)
  A Pattern Language: Towns, Buildings, Construction
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY

- **Senge1990FifthDiscipline** (Senge, 1990)
  The Fifth Discipline: The Art and Practice of the Learning Organization
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **VonNeumann1944GameTheory** (von Neumann, 1944)
  Theory of Games and Economic Behavior
  Keywords: HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:CO

- **Miller1956MagicalNumber** (Miller, 1956) doi:10.1037/h0043158
  The Magical Number Seven, Plus or Minus Two: Some Limits on Our Capacity for Processing Information
  Keywords: HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:CO

- **Gladwell2000TippingPoint** (Gladwell, 2000)
  The Tipping Point: How Little Things Can Make a Big Difference
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **Schon1983ReflectivePractitioner** (Schön, 1983)
  The Reflective Practitioner: How Professionals Think in Action
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:RE

- **Gibson1979EcologicalApproach** (Gibson, 1979)
  The Ecological Approach to Visual Perception
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN

- **Laird2012Standard** (Laird, 2012)
  The Soar Cognitive Architecture
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:RE

## T10: Collaboration & Teams — CSCW, joint cognitive systems, human-autonomy teaming

- **Licklider1960ManComputer** (Licklider, 1960) doi:10.1109/THFE2.1960.4503259
  Man-Computer Symbiosis
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY

- **Grudin1988WhyCSCW** (Grudin, 1988) doi:10.1145/62266.62273
  Why {CSCW} Applications Fail: Problems in the Design and Evaluation of Organizational Interfaces
  Keywords: HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:P

- **Olson2000DistanceMatters** (Olson, 2000) doi:10.1207/S15327051HCI1523_4
  Distance Matters
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:DE

- **Klein2005CommonGround** (Klein, 2005) doi:10.1002/0471739448.ch6
  Common Ground and Coordination in Joint Activity
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **Salas2005BigFive** (Salas, 2005) doi:10.1177/1046496405277134
  Is There a ``Big Five'' in Teamwork?
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:SY

- **Hollnagel2005JointCognitive** (Hollnagel, 2005) doi:10.1201/9781420038194

- **Lee2004TrustAutomation** (Lee, 2004) doi:10.1518/hfes.46.1.50_30392

- **Williams2000PairProgramming** (Williams, 2000) doi:10.1145/332833.332848
  All {I} Really Need to Know About Pair Programming {I} Learned in Kindergarten

- **Noy2023ProductivityAI** (Noy, 2023) doi:10.1126/science.adh2586

- **ONeill2022HumanAutonomy** (O'Neill, 2022) doi:10.1177/0018720820960865

- **Rahwan2018SocietyLoop** (Rahwan, 2018) doi:10.1007/s10676-017-9430-8

  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN

- **Bansal2019MentalModels** (Bansal, 2019)
  Beyond Accuracy: The Role of Mental Models in Human-{AI} Team Performance
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:CO

- **CannonBowers1993SharedMentalModels** (Cannon-Bowers, 1993) doi:10.1006/obhd.1993.1027
  Shared Mental Models in Expert Team Decision Making
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:P

- **Endsley1995SituationAwareness** (Endsley, 1995) doi:10.1518/001872095779049543
  Toward a Theory of Situation Awareness in Dynamic Systems
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **Malone1994InterdisciplinaryCoordination** (Malone, 1994) doi:10.1145/174666.174668
  The Interdisciplinary Study of Coordination
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:DE

- **Parasuraman2000AdaptiveAutomation** (Parasuraman, 2000) doi:10.1109/3468.844354
  A Model for Types and Levels of Human Interaction with Automation
  Keywords: HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:P

- **Arrieta2020ExplainableAI** (Arrieta, 2020) doi:10.1016/j.inffus.2019.12.012
  Explainable Artificial Intelligence ({XAI}): Concepts, Taxonomies, Opportunities and Challenges Toward Responsible {AI}

- **Chen2018HumanRobotTeaming** (Chen, 2018) doi:10.1080/1463922X.2017.1315750

- **Vicente1999CognitiveWorkAnalysis** (Vicente, 1999)

- **Helmreich1999CRM** (Helmreich, 1999) doi:10.1136/bmj.320.7237.781

## T12: Complexity Science — emergence, complex adaptive systems, swarm intelligence, cybernetics

- **Holland1995HiddenOrder** (Holland, 1995)
  Hidden Order: How Adaptation Builds Complexity
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:RE

- **Kauffman1993Origins** (Kauffman, 1993) doi:10.1093/oso/9780195079517.001.0001

  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:RE

- **Prigogine1984Order** (Prigogine, 1984)
  Order Out of Chaos: Man's New Dialogue with Nature

  An Introduction to Cybernetics

- **Beer1981Brain** (Beer, 1981)
  Brain of the Firm

- **Barabasi1999Emergence** (Barab\'{a}si, 1999) doi:10.1126/science.286.5439.509
  Emergence of Scaling in Random Networks

- **Watts1998SmallWorld** (Watts, 1998) doi:10.1038/30918
  Collective Dynamics of `Small-World' Networks

- **Albert2002Statistical** (Albert, 2002) doi:10.1103/RevModPhys.74.47
  Statistical Mechanics of Complex Networks
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:IN

- **Woods2015FourConcepts** (Woods, 2015) doi:10.1016/j.ress.2015.03.018
  Four Concepts for Resilience and the Implications for the Future of Resilience Engineering
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:IN

- **Dekker2011Drift** (Dekker, 2011) doi:10.1201/9781315257396
  Drift into Failure: From Hunting Broken Components to Understanding Complex Systems
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:SY

  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO

- **Wright1932Roles** (Wright, 1932)
  The Roles of Mutation, Inbreeding, Crossbreeding, and Selection in Evolution
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:IN

- **Langton1990EdgeChaos** (Langton, 1990) doi:10.1016/0167-2789(90)90064-V
  Computation at the Edge of Chaos: Phase Transitions and Emergent Computation
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:IN

- **Bonabeau1999SwarmIntelligence** (Bonabeau, 1999)
  Swarm Intelligence: From Natural to Artificial Systems
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE

- **Achlioptas2009Percolation** (Achlioptas, 2009) doi:10.1126/science.1167782
  Explosive Percolation in Random Networks
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:CO

- **Newman2005PowerLaws** (Newman, 2005) doi:10.1080/00107510500052444
  Power Laws, {Pareto} Distributions and {Zipf's} Law
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:SY

- **Walker2004Resilience** (Walker, 2004) doi:10.5751/ES-00650-090205
  Resilience, Adaptability and Transformability in Social-Ecological Systems
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:IN

- **Gunderson2002Panarchy** (Gunderson, 2002)
  Panarchy: Understanding Transformations in Human and Natural Systems
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:DE

- **Nisbett1977Telling** (Nisbett, 1977) doi:10.1037/0033-295X.84.3.231
  Telling More Than We Can Know: Verbal Reports on Mental Processes
  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:IN

- **Wason1968Reasoning** (Wason, 1968) doi:10.1080/14640746808400161

  Keywords: HUMMBL:IN HUMMBL:RE

- **Simons1999Gorilla** (Simons, 1999) doi:10.1068/p281059
  Gorillas in Our Midst: Sustained Inattentional Blindness for Dynamic Events

- **Hutchins1995Cognition** (Hutchins, 1995)
  Cognition in the Wild
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO

- **Klein1993Recognition** (Klein, 1993) doi:10.1037/0033-295X.100.3.363

- **Ericsson1995LongTerm** (Ericsson, 1995) doi:10.1037/0033-295X.102.2.211

  Keywords: HUMMBL:P HUMMBL:CO

- **Sternberg1999Successful** (Sternberg, 1999) doi:10.1037/1089-2680.3.4.292

  Keywords: HUMMBL:DE HUMMBL:SY

  Keywords: HUMMBL:SY HUMMBL:CO

## T4: Agentic AI — AI alignment, multi-agent systems, safety, governance frameworks
